title: Set of 8 Glitter Curly Christmas Tree Picks Decorations, 33cm Swirl Curly Ball Sprays Faux Candy Stems for Xmas Tree Home Holiday Flower Arrangements Wreath Vase Craft Filler (Red White Black)

description: Safety Warning Choking hazard - Keep out of reach of children and pets. Not suitable for children under 3 years.
